title: Ancillary Range P177 Chefs choice 12 cm Blini/One Egg Pan

features: NOTE:Do not overheat the pan, first time use wash with hot soapy water and use cooking lubricants such as oil
description: From the manufacturer The Chefs Choice - Lifestyle Cooking with Chef's Choice means both the food and cooking experience is awesome! For starters, Chef's Choice cookware is made in the UK, because when it comes to quality cooking, you want the highest standards. Pots and Pans are dishwasher safe, non-stick with heat resistant handles just to name a few! Cook with Chef's Choice, and you'll cook like a pro! About Us Pendeford Housewares importing and manufacturing kitchenware since 1958. Manufacturing cookware since 1958 and still family owned, Pendeford has reputation for providing quality UK made products. We manufacture, import and distribute quality housewares specialising in cookware, bakeware, teapots & kettles, high quality plastic kitchenware and laundry accessories. Originally known for producing hand spun polished aluminium Pendeford has evolved over decades to being a supplier of high-quality homewares with over 300+ products in our range across 15+ of our own brands.
